summary: My-AlphaAI UX Enhancements testing completed. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified. New admin analytics endpoints (analytics-filtered, mrr-trends, signal-history) working correctly with admin_key authentication. Admin Analytics tab shows Platform Metrics stat cards with range selector dropdown (Today/7d/30d), 4 MRR/subscription trend charts (MRR Over Time, Subscriptions vs Cancellations, Net Revenue Daily, Cumulative Revenue), and Signal Volume chart with 7-day moving average. Onboarding modal (3-step) appears for first-time users on dashboard, persists completion in localStorage. Existing admin dashboard Overview tab still works.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/analytics-filtered correctly returns platform metrics with range filter (today/7d/30d)
GET /api/admin/analytics-filtered returns: total_users, pro_users, elite_users, active_subscriptions, signals, page_views, api_calls, demo_mode
GET /api/admin/mrr-trends returns 30 days of trend data with mrr, new_subscriptions, cancellations, net_revenue, cumulative_revenue
GET /api/admin/signal-history returns 30 days of signal data with count and ma7 (7-day moving average)
All new admin endpoints require admin_key authentication (returns 403 for invalid key, 422 for missing key)
Admin Analytics tab (data-testid='tab-analytics') shows all 5 charts rendering correctly
Range selector dropdown (data-testid='analytics-range-select') dynamically filters Platform Metrics
MRR Over Time chart (data-testid='mrr-chart') shows area chart with gradient fill
Subscriptions vs Cancellations chart (data-testid='subs-chart') shows bar chart with legend
Net Revenue Daily chart (data-testid='net-revenue-chart') shows bar chart
Cumulative Revenue chart (data-testid='cumulative-revenue-chart') shows area chart
Signal Volume chart (data-testid='signal-history-chart') shows bar chart with 7d moving average line
Onboarding modal (data-testid='onboarding-modal') appears for first-time users after 1.2s delay
Onboarding modal has 3 steps: Welcome to AlphaAI, How Signals Work, Flexible Subscriptions
Onboarding modal has Next button (data-testid='onboarding-next-btn') and Skip button (data-testid='onboarding-skip')
Onboarding completion sets localStorage 'alphaai_onboarded' flag to prevent re-showing
Existing admin dashboard Overview tab still works with all stat cards
Demo mode is ON - analytics endpoints return synthetic random data (expected behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Analytics UX enhancements fully tested. 3 new backend endpoints: /api/admin/analytics-filtered (with range param), /api/admin/mrr-trends, /api/admin/signal-history. All require admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026. Frontend Analytics tab shows 7 stat cards with range selector, 4 MRR/subscription charts, and 1 signal history chart. Onboarding modal uses localStorage key 'alphaai_onboarded' - clear it to test modal appearing. Demo mode is ON so analytics data is synthetic/random.
